## Understanding the Big Bang Theory

```json
{
  "explanation": "The Big Bang theory posits that the universe originated from a single point of infinite density approximately 13.8 billion years ago and has been expanding ever since.",
  "key_terms": [
    "Cosmic Microwave Background",
    "Nuclear Nucleosynthesis",
    "Inflationary Epoch"
  ],
  "historical_context": {
    "Evidence Source": "Arno Penzias and Robert Wilson detected cosmic background radiation in 1964",
    "Pioneer Figure": "Edwin Hubble discovered the expansion of the universe through galaxy redshift"
  }
}
```<|im_end|>
